sizing.fixed_notional: candidate-level returns include no-activation and fully unfilled grids as zero-return cash; unresolved censored candidates are excluded
sizing.fixed_risk: candidate-level R uses a train-fitted percentile stop; no-fill candidates are 0R and 1R is a fixed risk budget
sizing.liquidation: approximation assumes 0.50% maintenance margin and excludes exchange tier details
